wine_experiences.name: Chapoutier Harvest Experience Tain-l'Hermitage
wine_experiences.address: 18 avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage, France
wine_experiences.description: Join M. Chapoutier's biodynamic harvest team on the Hermitage hill or Crozes-Hermitage vineyards. Participants pick alongside winery staff, learn biodynamic viticulture principles, and finish with a hosted lunch with Hermitage wines and the Chapoutier team.

verified.address_quoted: 18 avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage

wine_experiences.name: Guigal La La Wines Vertical Masterclass
wine_experiences.description: Private vertical tasting of E. Guigal's La La wines (La Landonne, La Mouline, La Turque) across multiple vintages in the Ampuis cellars. Led by a senior member of the Guigal team; access to barrel samples from current vintage.

wine_experiences.name: Chateau Beaucastel Blending Workshop
wine_experiences.experience_type: Blending workshop with the Perrin family
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on blending workshop at Chateau de Beaucastel led by a Perrin family member. Participants blend samples of all 13 permitted Chateauneuf-du-Pape varieties to create their own assemblage, bottled and labelled as a take-home souvenir.

wine_experiences.name: Hermitage Hill Sunrise Walk and Tasting
wine_experiences.experience_type: Guided sunrise vineyard walk with tasting
wine_experiences.description: Early morning guided walk up the Hermitage hill with a specialist guide explaining the granitic terroir and the famous single-vineyard lieux-dits. The walk culminates in a panoramic sunrise view and a Hermitage blanc tasting at the summit.

wine_experiences.name: Chateauneuf-du-Pape Harvest Vendanges Stay
wine_experiences.description: Three-day harvest immersion in Chateauneuf-du-Pape coordinated by Inter Rhone and the Syndicat des Proprietaires. Participants pick, sort and press across two estates; includes the grape sorting table and morning vinification tour. Accommodation at Fines Roches recommended.

wine_experiences.name: Condrieu Viognier Sensory Workshop
wine_experiences.description: Sensory tasting workshop at a Condrieu estate exploring the distinctive apricot, peach, violet and May blossom aromatics of Viognier across multiple Condrieu producers. Led by a trained oenologist; includes nose-training kit and comparative tasting across three Condrieu cuvees.

wine_experiences.name: Tavel Rose Vineyard Picnic at Pont du Gard
wine_experiences.neighborhood: Pont du Gard, Tavel appellation junction
wine_experiences.description: Curated outdoor tasting experience combining a visit to the Pont du Gard UNESCO aqueduct with a Tavel rosé picnic at a producer estate. Three Tavel estates represented; the only appellation where all wines are rosé; picnic basket with Provencal charcuterie included.

wine_experiences.name: Muscat de Beaumes-de-Venise VDN Experience
wine_experiences.address: Place de la Mairie, 84190 Beaumes-de-Venise, France
wine_experiences.experience_type: Fortified Muscat tasting and production visit
wine_experiences.description: Tasting experience focussed on the unique Muscat Vin Doux Naturel production of Beaumes-de-Venise, one of the Rhone's most distinctive sweet wines. Includes a fortification demonstration at the cooperative, tasting across young and aged Muscat styles, and food pairing with local nougat.

wine_experiences.name: Dentelles de Montmirail Twilight Vineyard Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Guided walk through the Dentelles de Montmirail limestone ridges at sunset with a tasting of Gigondas and Vacqueyras under the Triassic rock formations. Three wines poured at altitude against one of the Southern Rhone's most dramatic backdrops.

wine_experiences.name: Rhone River Barge Wine Cruise
wine_experiences.address: Quai de la Ligne, 84000 Avignon, France
wine_experiences.experience_type: River cruise with onboard wine tasting
wine_experiences.description: River barge cruise from Avignon along the Rhone with onboard tasting of Southern Rhone wines. The sommelier presents a structured four-wine flight of Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Tavel, Lirac and Cotes du Rhone while passing the historic river estates. Optional docking at a riverside vineyard.
